title: bursera frenningiae
intro: Bursera frenningiae, also known as the Mexican copal tree or copal, is a species of tree in the family Burseraceae. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Bursera frenningiae include reducing pain and inflammation, improving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, and supporting immune function. The herbal preparations of Bursera frenningiae include essential oils extracted from its resin, which can be used topically or inhaled, as well as infused in teas or taken as capsules for its medicinal benefits.
